title: The Gadabout Company
address: P.O. Box 6497. Big Bear Lake. CA 92315
description:
Yes, at last a vacation spot in southern California for lesbians only. Come to the beauty of Big Bear Lake in the San Bernardino Mountains for relaxing and enjoyable week or weekend. 

The Gadabout Company (a loving couple) invites you to share in the warm and congenial atmosphere of their home. AII meals are cooked and
served home-style (special diets can be arranged).

The home abounds with activities including a billiards room with a regulation-size pool table, video games, and movies. Table games, cards, and a large, unofficial library, sunbathing on the upstairs deck and an indoor jacuzzi also add to the vacation mood. Outdoor winter fun includes snow skiing (one of the largest ski slopes in the area is within view), tobogganing ice skating, snowmobiling ice fishing, and
building snowladies. After all these activities you'll be able to kick back and enjoy warming yourself around the glow of one of our fireplaces, with your favorite beverage in hand. (Excellent roads are open and accessible all year.

In the summer, the activities are countless at Big Bear Lake-horseback
riding, water skiing, swimming air and boat tours, fishing walking in the
woods, scenic drives, sailing, golf tennis and browsing through the various village shops.
Above all, relax and enjoy a change of pace for a weekend or a week. By the week, accommodations are bed and breakfast; by the weekend, accommodations are bed and full board (from Friday afternoon through Sunday afternoon.
Both singles and couples are welcome. For the comfort of everyone, there are non-smoking and smoking areas in our home. Accommodations are limited to ensure personalization.
